inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User body weight in kilograms for personalized calorie calculation based on metabolic energy expenditure.

businessContext_i18n.en: User body weight in kilograms for personalized calorie calculation based on metabolic energy expenditure.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metabolik enerji harcamasına dayalı kişiselleştirilmiş kalori hesaplaması için kullanıcının kilogram cinsinden vücut ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Benutzers in Kilogramm für personalisierte Kalorienberechnung basierend auf metabolischem Energieverbrauch.

inputs.label: Dance Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total time spent dancing in minutes, used to compute total calorie burn.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time spent dancing in minutes, used to compute total calorie burn.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakika cinsinden toplam dans süresi, toplam yakılan kaloriyi hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Tanzzeit in Minuten, verwendet zur Berechnung des gesamten Kalorienverbrauchs.

inputs.label: MET Value
inputs.businessContext: Metabolic Equivalent of Task representing intensity of dancing; typical values: 3-10 where 1 MET = 3.5 ml O2/kg/min.

businessContext_i18n.en: Metabolic Equivalent of Task representing intensity of dancing; typical values: 3-10 where 1 MET = 3.5 ml O2/kg/min.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dans yoğunluğunu temsil eden metabolik eşdeğer; tipik değerler: 3-10, 1 MET = 3.5 ml O2/kg/dk.
businessContext_i18n.de: Metabolisches Äquivalent der Aufgabe, das die Intensität des Tanzes darstellt; typische Werte: 3-10, wobei 1 MET = 3,5 ml O2/kg/min.

inputs.label: Intensity Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to adjust calculated calories for perceived effort (0.5 = half effort, 2.0 = twice effort).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to adjust calculated calories for perceived effort (0.5 = half effort, 2.0 = twice effort).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Algılanan efor için hesaplanan kalorileri ayarlayan çarpan (0.5 = yarım efor, 2.0 = iki kat efor).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator zur Anpassung der berechneten Kalorien an die wahrgenommene Anstrengung (0,5 = halbe Anstrengung, 2,0 = doppelte Anstrengung).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
